Subject: RE: roll call for skiing
Message:
Jen, 
my flight gets into Oakland at 11 p.m. on Thursday night; we could meet up for drinks... somewhere. in the city or EBay, depending upon who else wants to join in the festivities, I guess. i gotta rise and shine early on Friday morn', tho. 
Tues. morning is also an option -- just prob. more difficult, unless you wanna play hookey from work, and we could meet at Abir's for coffee. 
any other takers for drinks on Feb. 14th ? come on, there must be some lonely hearts out thar'  :-) 
Jo

tahoe 
ski

flew
